programme.title: My Penguin Friend

programme.title: Twisted Neighbor

programme.title: Couples Therapy
programme.desc: Four couples and their therapy sessions with psychoanalyst Dr. Orna Guralnik in New York.

programme.title: Couples Therapy

programme.title: Cyrano
programme.desc: Cyrano de Bergerac dazzles everyone with his ferocious wordplay and brilliant swordplay. However, he's convinced his appearance renders him unworthy of the affections of the luminous Roxanne, a devoted friend who's in love with someone else.

programme.title: Clika
programme.desc: When a clip of his performance goes viral, a small-town singer seizes the opportunity to carve out a place for himself on the music scene. Caught in a dangerous game, he must confront the choices he's made as he relentlessly pursues his dream.

programme.title: The Roses
programme.desc: Life seems easy for picture-perfect couple Theo and Ivy: successful careers, a loving marriage, great kids. However, a tinderbox of fierce competition and hidden resentments soon emerge when Theo's career nosedives and Ivy's own ambitions take off.

programme.title: Peacemaker

programme.title: Gem & Shaz
programme.desc: Two Asian Canadian teenage girls are given one hour at the school dance by their strict immigrant parents and are determined to make the most of it.

programme.title: Kalinga (Care)
programme.desc: At the age of six, director Kent Donguines' mother leaves him and his family in the Philippines to become a nanny overseas. Now an adult, he shares the stories of several Filipina caregivers in Vancouver, bearing witness to their sacrifice as they struggle to reunite with their children. Kent maps out the emotional landscape and trauma of migrant labor.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
